name: node-resumer
title: node-resumer
summary: through stream that starts paused and resumes on the next tick
description:
through stream that starts paused and resumes on the next tick
Return a through stream that starts out paused and resumes on the next tick,
unless somebody called .pause().
.
This module has the same signature as through.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-resumer because through stream that starts paused and resumes on the next tick.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-resumer as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-resumer with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-resumer --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
